sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83394" key="plagioba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰγιο-βάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n83394.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walking obliquely</tr_>, dub. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλαγιοβαθεῖς</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:110:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
